action.reasoning: Observation: ResNet34 (30ep) reached bal_acc=0.0971 (val~9.2%), curves show slow gain but many_shot_acc collapsed to 0.0056 while few_shot=0.165 (over-reweighting). Time ~80s. Analysis: Scratch training slow on LT; weak aug (no RandAug); weight=1/c too aggressive; limited capacity. Decision: Upgrade to ResNet50; refactor dataset to PIL+RandAugment for stronger aug; milder weights (c**0.5); add FocalLoss(gamma=2); 60 epochs + cosine; submit_eval immediately for new baseline (time allows ~4min run).
